_comment: Externalized tuning tables (decision #13). trust(source) and rel(method) per architecture s7. Per-claim base belief b = trust x rel x norm_quality; max achievable b = 0.95 so confidence never reaches 1.0 by construction.

cluster_conf._comment: Entity-resolution certainty, set by the WEAKEST edge holding a cluster together (architecture s8d). Singleton = nothing merged = no merge risk.
